message:
🌱 localai: feat: Assistant API (#1092)

* 🌱 Add localai: feat: Assistant API mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: remove incorrect PR and update resolution for localai#1273

The referenced PR was about query parameter model detection, not the
realtime API. Remove pr field from sourceUrls and update resolution
to note no single merged PR was identified for the realtime API.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: clarify localai#1273 resolution — PR #1703 is partial (file upload only)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "localai-1273-feat-assistant-api",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "localai: feat: Assistant API",
+    "description": "feat: Assistant API. Requested by 6+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current localai deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your localai version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai\nhelm list -n localai 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working localai installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review localai configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant localai configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai\nkubectl get configmap -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=localai\n```\nOpenAI released the Assistant API. https://platform.openai.com/docs/assistants/overview\n\nThis thread is to collect thoughts on how to integrate this - it seems we have already all the needed pieces, but it's needed to stich things together to expose"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for feat: Assistant API",
+        "description": "This PR adds the [file upload apis](https://platform.openai.com/docs/api-reference/files).\n\nPart of https://github.com/mudler/LocalAI/issues/1273\n\nDon't merge yet. Looking for issues and early reviews. Forgot to write tests, but it does work.\n\n- [X] Yes, I signed my commits.\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai\nkubectl get events -n localai --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"feat: Assistant API\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Note: PR #1703 (mudler/LocalAI#1703) is a partial implementation covering file upload functionality only, not the full Assistant API. The complete Assistant API (threads, runs, messages) remains unimplemented. The realtime API implementation is tracked in the issue but no single merged PR was identified as the definitive fix. The referenced PR was incorrect \u2014 it addressed query parameter model detection rather than the realtime API. This issue remains open for community contribution.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
